steps.title: Prepare 1% (w/v) TCA by diluting...
steps.instruction: Prepare 1% (w/v) TCA by diluting 1 g of TCA for each 100 ml of mQ H 2 O

steps.title: Trypsinize cells and resuspend in 1 mL of PBS
steps.instruction: Trypsinize cells and resuspend in 1 mL of PBS

steps.title: Add 500 µL/sample of 1% cold TCA
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL/sample of 1% cold TCA

steps.title: Vortex
steps.instruction: Vortex

steps.title: Incubate for 10 min on ice
steps.instruction: Incubate for 10 min on ice

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000 g for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000 g for 10 minutes

steps.title: If using the kit for the first time
steps.instruction: If using the kit for the first time: Prepare a 100 mM DTT stock solution by adding 1,62 mL of H 2 O mQ to the bottle containing 25 mg DTT. Aliquot into ten 160 µL volumes and store frozen at ≤20 ºC. Stock solutions of DTT are stable for six months to one year. Thawed aliquots should be kept on ice or at 4 ºC until ready to use

steps.title: Make 1 mL of 1X Reaction...
steps.instruction: Make 1 mL of 1X Reaction Buffer by adding 50 µL of 20X Reaction Buffer to 950 µL of H 2 O mQ

steps.title: Make 1 mL of 10 mM...
steps.instruction: Make 1 mL of 10 mM of luciferin solution by adding 1 mL of 1X Reaction Buffer to one vial of luciferin (blue cap). Protect from light until use . This stock solution is reasonably stable for several weeks if stored at ≤ 20 ºC, protected from light. Divide in 250 µL aliquots

steps.title: Prepare a 10 mL Standard Reaction...
steps.instruction: Prepare a 10 mL Standard Reaction Solution, which will be enough for one microplate as follows:
8.9 mL H 2 O mQ
0.5 mL 20X Reaction Buffer
0.1 mL 100mM DTT
0.5 mL 10 mM luciferin
2.5 µL luciferase

steps.title: Gently invert the tube to mix, do not vortex
steps.instruction: Gently invert the tube to mix, do not vortex . Keep the reaction solution protected from light until ready to use . Although the solution may be stored at 2-6 ºC protected from light for several days, assay sensitivity will diminish with time.

steps.title: Prepare a 100 µM ATP stock...
steps.instruction: Prepare a 100 µM ATP stock solution by adding 1 µL of 5 mM ATP standard solution to 49 µL of H 2 O mQ (total volume: 50 µL)

steps.title: Prepare the following dilutions
steps.instruction: Prepare the following dilutions

steps.title: 10 µM 10X
steps.instruction: 10 µM 10X. Add 10 µL of the stock solution to 90 µL of H 2 O mQ

steps.title: 1 µM 10X
steps.instruction: 1 µM 10X. Add 10 µL of the previous solution to 90 µL of H 2 O mQ
0.5 µM 10X. Add 50 µL of the previous solution to 50 µL of H 2 O mQ
0.25 µM 10X. Add 50 µL of the previous solution to 50 µL of H 2 O mQ
0.1 µM 10X. Add 40 µL of the previous solution to 60 µL of H 2 O mQ
0.05 µM 10X. Add 50 µL of the previous solution to 50 µL of H 2 O mQ
0.025 µM 10X. Add 50 µL of the previous solution to 50 µL of H 2 O mQ

steps.title: To the microplate, add two to...
steps.instruction: To the microplate, add two to three duplicates of standard reaction solution as a blank measure of background luminescence

steps.title: Add two to three duplicates of...
steps.instruction: Add two to three duplicates of each 1X dilution to the microplate, adding 10 µL of the dilution and 90 µL of Standard Reaction Solution

steps.title: Prepare several serialized dilutions for ATP determination of the sample
steps.instruction: Prepare several serialized dilutions for ATP determination of the sample

steps.title: Add 10 µL of the serialized...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL of the serialized dilutions of the sample and 90 µL Standard Reaction Solution, taking into account that this is also a 1:10 dilution on the microplate

steps.title: Incubate for 10-15 minutes at room...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 10-15 minutes at room temperature and protected from light

steps.title: Measure at 560 nm, remove background...
steps.instruction: Measure at 560 nm, remove background signal and standardize using the Standard curve
